subcodes.first_line: The Pen hath testified to the Kingdom, unto the Ancient Lord; the Tongue of Command hath borne witness unto My Most Great Name; the Names have testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم الملک لمالک القدم قد شهد اللسان الامر لاسمی الاعظم قد شهدت الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
